ItacPersonItem.Notes: Polyglot (in particular of Syrian, Hebrew, and Greek languages). It is not clear whether he joined the Lincei, but his membership was backed in 1612 by Della Porta - who hoped Valguarnera opened a section of the Lincei in Palermo - and in 1616 by Cesi.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
